fulldocument
string
Optional. By default, watch () returns the delta of those fields modified by an
update operation, instead of the entire updated document.
Set fullDocument to "updateLookup" to direct watch () to look up the most
current majority-committed version of the updated document. watch () returns a
fullDocument field with the document lookup in addition to the
updateDescription delta. (
Starting in MongoDB 6.0, you can set fullDocument to:
• "whenAvailable" to output the document post-image, if available, after
the document was inserted, replaced, or updated.
• "required" to output the document post-image after the document was
inserted, replaced, or updated. Raises an error if the post-image is not
available.
